tags.name: `mc-segmented-control-item`
tags.description:
Purpose: A segmented control item to be used within an `mc-segmented-control`.
Category: Navigation, Content Display, Data Display
When to use: When you need to present multiple related options in a compact space.
When not to use: For unrelated options or when space is not a concern.
Works with components: mc-segmented-control
Alternative component names: Segmented Button Group, Tabbed Navigation

Events:

  * `onfocus` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the toggle button receives focus.

  * `onblur` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the toggle button loses focus.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where main label goes.

  * `sublabel` {} - The `sublabel` slot where the sublabel goes.

  * `icon` {} - The `icon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

  * `trailingicon` {} - The `trailingicon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

Properties:

  * `selected` {`boolean`} - The selected state of the segmented control item.

attributes.name: ononfocus
attributes.description: `onfocus` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the toggle button receives focus.

attributes.name: ononblur
attributes.description: `onblur` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the toggle button loses focus.
